privileged_info_summary: The task operates on three synthetic Odoo CRM opportunities created via XML-RPC at task setup. All opportunity names are verified: 'Cloud Migration - Hyperion Systems', 'ERP Implementation - Zenith Corp', 'Consulting Retainer - Apex Global'. All expected values are verified as correct: lost reason 'Too Expensive' is created and expected; tag 'At Risk' is created and expected; target stage 'Negotiation' is specified in task description and verified by script; target probability 90.0% is specified in task description and verified by verifier script. Data is completely synthetic, created during setup with no external data sources.
